programme.title: Swatantra Veer Savarkar
programme.desc: After witnessing the tyranny of Britishers at a very young age, Vinayak Damodar Savarkar joins the struggle for India's freedom and faces severe incidents in his life.

programme.title: Khuda Haafiz: Chapter 2 - Agni Pariksha
programme.desc: After the death of his friend's brother, Sameer and Nargis adopt his daughter Nandini. However, trouble ensues when she gets kidnapped.

programme.title: Jersey
programme.desc: A former cricketer in his late 30s returns to the sport to fulfil his son's dream of owning a cricket jersey, battling personal and professional challenges.

programme.title: Tarla
programme.desc: With dreams bigger than every social barrier known to women, Tarla Dalal embarks on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

programme.title: Runway 34
programme.desc: Upon dealing with the rough climate in Cochin, two pilots make a risky landing in Thiruvananthapuram. But trouble ensues when personnel from the AAIB probes the matter.

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: When her disabled daughter is kidnapped, Vidya attempts to save her, but a car knocks her off. When the police get involved in the case, Vidya's mysterious past is revealed.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

programme.title: Omerta
programme.desc: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: The relationship between two stepbrothers develops cracks when they fall in love with the same woman. As a result, the younger brother tries to kill the other and inherit the insurance money.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.
